history_of_present_illness: Mr. Foster reports he takes his blood thinner 'every single day, never miss a dose' and is confused why his levels are low. He mentions he recently started eating a large kale-and-spinach salad daily for his health. He had a couple of episodes of his heart 'racing and fluttering' over the last two days.

review_of_systems.cardiovascular: Two episodes of palpitations in 48h, brief. No chest pain, no syncope.

social_history.diet: Recently started large daily leafy-green salads

medication_adherence.detail: Patient insists he takes it daily without missing.

symptom_diary.entry: Started having a big healthy salad every day — kale, spinach, the works.
Heart did that fluttering thing again for a minute. Watch said 132.

patient_concerns: Frustrated and a little offended that the clinic keeps asking if he takes his pills.
Wants to know why his numbers are off if he's doing everything right.
